**As a** customer who wants to buy and sell unused furniture
**I need** an application which can provide a marketplace to buy and sell furniture 
**So that** it is easy and cost-effective with various feature to filter and sort different types of furniture
### Details and Assumptions
    * Should support filters.
    * Should show furniture condition
    * Should have feature to sort by price
    * Should have a slider to set custom price range
    * Should have details and photos of the furniture
    * Should have a comment section under each product listing

### Acceptance Criteria
    gherkin
